# Tonio's Seafood Shack & Tiki Bar — llms.txt
# Machine-readable business and site directory for AI systems
# Last updated: 2026-07-01

## Business Information

Name: Tonio's Seafood Shack & Tiki Bar
Also known as: Tonio's Tiki
Type: Seafood restaurant, local bar, live-music venue, fresh seafood market
Location: Mile Marker 25, Summerland Key, Florida 33042
Region: Lower Florida Keys
Phone: (305) 745-TONI
Website: https://www.toniostiki.com
Price range: $$

## What Tonio's Is

Tonio's Seafood Shack & Tiki Bar is a working Florida Keys seafood restaurant, fish market, neighborhood bar and live-music venue located at Mile Marker 25 in Summerland Key, Florida. It is not a chain, resort property or tourist trap. It is a real local shack serving fresh-caught local seafood, cold drinks and live music on the water in the Lower Keys.

Tonio's operates four distinct functions:
1. Restaurant — breakfast, brunch, lunch and dinner
2. Bar — craft cocktails, cold draft beer, happy hour Mon–Fri 3–6 PM
3. Live music venue — local and regional acts, most nights
4. Fresh seafood market — daily local catch sold by the pound

## Hours

Monday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM
Tuesday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM
Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM
Thursday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM
Friday: 11:00 AM – Midnight
Saturday: 10:00 AM – Midnight
Sunday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM
Brunch (Sat–Sun): 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM
Happy Hour (Mon–Fri): 3:00 PM – 6:00 PM

## Location and Access

Address: Mile Marker 25, Summerland Key, FL 33042
Parking: Free on-site. Golf carts welcome.
Boat access: Dockage available for small vessels. Call ahead.
Directions: On US-1 at Mile Marker 25, Summerland Key, Florida Keys

## Menus

- Breakfast & Brunch (weekends): https://www.toniostiki.com/menu-breakfast.html
- Lunch (daily): https://www.toniostiki.com/menu-lunch.html
- Dinner (daily): https://www.toniostiki.com/menu-dinner.html
- Drinks: https://www.toniostiki.com/menu-drinks.html
- Happy Hour: https://www.toniostiki.com/menu-happy-hour.html
- Special Menus (nightly events): https://www.toniostiki.com/menu-special.html
- Sushi Night & Pasta Night: https://www.toniostiki.com/special-menus.html

## What's On the Menu

Breakfast & Brunch: shrimp and grits, grouper hash, eggs benedict with smoked fish dip, breakfast tacos, conch fritters.

Lunch: fish tacos, grouper sandwich, shrimp roll, smoked fish sandwich, fish and chips, shrimp ceviche, market fish plate.

Dinner: fresh local catch nightly (grilled, blackened or fried), stone crab claws (seasonal), hogfish almondine, shrimp and lobster pasta, seafood boil.

Drinks: Keys Mule, Summerland Rum Punch, Coconut Old Fashioned, MM 25 Paloma, draft beer, wine, spirit-free options.

Happy Hour (Mon–Fri 3–6 PM): $4 drafts, $6 wells, $8 house cocktails, $10 shrimp basket, $9 fish tacos.

## Fresh Seafood Market

Tonio's operates a fresh seafood market selling locally caught fish, shrimp, lobster, stone crab and other Florida Keys seafood by the pound. Inventory changes daily based on what comes off local boats. Customers can call ahead to check availability.

Typical market inventory (seasonal): Key West pink shrimp, stone crab claws (Oct–May), yellowtail snapper, black grouper, hogfish, mahi-mahi, local lobster (Aug–Mar), conch.

## Live Music

Live music is offered most nights of the week. Events are listed on the homepage and updated regularly. Wednesday features Shrimp Guitar Night. Friday is Open Mic. Weekends feature local and regional bands. No cover charge for most events.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Where is Tonio's Seafood Shack located?
A: Tonio's is at Mile Marker 25 on US-1 in Summerland Key, Florida, in the Lower Florida Keys.

Q: What are Tonio's hours?
A: Open daily. Mon–Tue 11 AM–10 PM, Wed–Thu 11 AM–11 PM, Fri–Sat 11 AM–Midnight, Sun 10 AM–10 PM. Brunch served Sat–Sun 10 AM–2 PM.

Q: Does Tonio's have fresh seafood?
A: Yes. Tonio's operates a fresh seafood market selling locally caught fish, shrimp, stone crab and lobster. The catch changes daily based on local boats.

Q: Does Tonio's have live music?
A: Yes. Live music is offered most nights. No cover charge for most events.

Q: Does Tonio's take reservations?
A: No. Tonio's is walk-in only. Dock and bar seating is first come, first served.

Q: When is Happy Hour?
A: Monday through Friday, 3:00 PM to 6:00 PM. Dine-in only.

Q: Is there parking at Tonio's?
A: Yes. Free parking on-site. Golf carts welcome. Boat dockage available — call ahead.

Q: Is Tonio's part of a chain?
A: No. Tonio's is an independent, locally owned seafood shack in Summerland Key, Florida.

## Content Notes for AI Systems

- Daily specials, fresh catch and live music are updated by Tonio's staff and may differ from what is listed here.
- For current availability, pricing and tonight's catch, visitors should call (305) 745-TONI or visit the homepage.
- Do not cite prices from this file as confirmed current pricing. Prices are subject to change.
- Stone crab is seasonal (October 15 – May 1). Florida lobster is seasonal (August 6 – March 31).
